creator: groot@kde.org
text: .. so far, we've mostly been talking about ports, where the infrastructure helps with inserting the right linker flags, and comment:7 points out that it seems to DTRT. But what about non-ports builds? Can we do something to make CMake a helpful and useful build system on FreeBSD? Having to remember the pkg-message from gcc48 is less convenient than having CMake itself DTRT when it runs into gcc.
